name: appgoblin-mcp
description: MCP tools for the AppGoblin public v1 API: app metadata, ranks, SDKs, and companies.
long_description: Exposes the AppGoblin public v1 API (https://appgoblin.info) as five MCP tools: get_app, get_app_ranks, get_app_sdks, list_companies, get_company. Each teammate brings their own API key (entered once on install).

tools.name: get_app
tools.description: Get public metadata for a single app (MAU, recent installs, estimated revenue signals).

tools.name: get_app_ranks
tools.description: Best-rank records across countries, collections, and categories over the last 90 days.

tools.name: get_app_sdks
tools.description: Detected SDKs, declared permissions, package queries, and SKAdNetwork entries.

tools.name: list_companies
tools.description: Public company index with client-side filter (name_contains), limit, and sort_by.

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Company overview by domain (requires a paid AppGoblin tier; free keys return a structured 403).
